messages.message: Sonuncusu sakıncalı olabilir Emin olamadım bebek
The Drama of Direct Sunlight: Capturing Boudoir Elegance Naturally

The Drama of Direct Sunlight: Capturing Boudoir Elegance Naturally
Embrace the magic of natural light!  Direct sunlight brings a unique blend of raw emotion and timeless elegance to boudoir photography. By playing with shadows, highlights, and textures, you can create breathtaking images that feel both intimate and cinematic.
Ready to explore how sunlight can transform your photos? Discover tips on capturing sensual, natural beauty in our latest blog post!
Tap the link in bio for our latest blog post!

Subject: Google Drive Links for Social Media Materials
Dear Iwona,
I hope you're doing well.
First of all, Id like to apologize for my delayed response and for not sharing the Google Drive links with you sooner.
Thank you very much for providing the blog post content and photos.
Below, youll find the links to the Google Drive folders where you can upload the social media materials for your reference.
Ill follow up with another email to share the details from the Onboarding - Company Information card in Asana.
Instagram Story
Recommended Social Media Sizes:
1080 x 1920 px  Reel / Story (Instagram / Facebook)
Please upload related materials to this folder:
[Google Drive Link]
Facebook Post
Recommended Social Media Sizes:
1080 x 1080 px  Square (Instagram / Facebook)
1080 x 1350 px  Portrait (Instagram / Facebook)
1200 x 630 px  Facebook posts with links
Please upload related materials to this folder:
[Google Drive Link]
Facebook Story
Recommended Social Media Sizes:
1080 x 1920 px  Reel / Story (Instagram / Facebook)
Please upload related materials to this folder:
[Google Drive Link]
Looking forward to your uploads.
Best regards,
Ceren

Ill follow up with another email to share the details from the Onboarding - Company Information card in Asana.
